engine.backend: RPC client plus four SYCL Level Zero rpc-server workers

commandSnippet: GGML_DISABLE_FUSED_RMS_NORM=1 GGML_DISABLE_FUSED_MUL_UNARY=1 llama-bench -m MiniMax-M2.7-UD-IQ4_XS-00001-of-00004.gguf -rpc 127.0.0.1:50100|0,127.0.0.1:50101|0,127.0.0.1:50102|0,127.0.0.1:50103|0 -p 0 -n 64 -r 3 -ngl 99 -sm layer -ts 1/1/1/1 -fa 0 -nkvo 0 -ub 32 -ctk f16 -ctv f16 --threads 4 -w 0 -mmp 1 -rtr 1 -fmoe 1 -no-mmad 0 -muge 1 -sas 0 -o json
notes: Same corrected device-map-fix layer split as prior 14.292 tok/s submission, but with K/Q/V offload enabled via -nkvo 0. KV remains F16; no speculative decoding, no expert dropping, no power-limit changes.
